compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect suggestion capture mechanism
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update existing documentation to reflect the new suggestion capture mechanism
**Why**: Future agents and maintainers need accurate awareness of the suggestion system — its architecture, invocation patterns, and integration points
**Scope**:
- IN: Update CLAUDE.md architecture section (mention .suggestions/ on tickets branch, suggestion-record.sh), update KNOWN-ISSUES.md if applicable, update any relevant existing docs
- OUT: Creating new documentation files (follow existing doc patterns only)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md architecture section references the suggestion capture mechanism and its integration points
  ← Satisfies: epic approach documentation requirement
- When this story is complete, all documentation updates follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md conventions
  ← Satisfies: documentation quality standard

comments.body: Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Claude

comments.body: Done definition update: Story explicitly targets CLAUDE.md as a safeguard file edit — this constitutes task-level authorization per Never-Do rule 18. Story title or description must name CLAUDE.md explicitly to satisfy the authorization chain.
comments.author: Claude
